title: EQ - Select a value, put the app in background, return - the selected value stays
scenario: EQ setting (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ) does not persist after app is backgrounded and reopened in Device Settings
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. Press the Home button or recent apps button to put the app into the background.
5. Wait a few seconds, then return to the Poly Studio Mobile app by tapping the app icon or selecting it from recent apps.
6. Navigate back to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
7. Observe the currently selected EQ value.
8. Repeat steps 2–7 for each of the remaining EQ values: Flat, Bright, and Custom EQ.
expected: The EQ value selected before backgrounding the app should still be selected after returning to the app, for all EQ values (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
